caption: A woman with curly blonde hair and black headphones is recording in a studio setting. She is wearing a black t-shirt and has her right hand raised toward her neck. She is positioned in front of a professional microphone and a white background with a yellow vertical stripe. To her left is a screen displaying the word "ohnson" in red text. Various logos appear on the screen, including "BOSS TALK 101" and a smaller circular logo containing the word "PODCAST." In the upper right corner of the background, the words "Employees Only" are visible. The woman maintains a consistent expression and posture across the sequence, with very slight movements in her facial expression and the position of her hand, suggesting she is listening or reflecting during a conversation.
